title: Vegan Banh Cuon with Peaches and Earthy Toppings
description: A refreshing vegan twist on the classic Vietnamese dish, featuring banh cuon, peaches, and earthy toppings. Perfect for a warm summer evening.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Replace with maple syrup for vegan version

instructions: Soak the banh cuon sheets in warm water for 10-15 minutes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start browning.
Add the sliced peaches and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Remove the pan from heat and stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice.
Assemble the banh cuon by placing a few slices of the mushroom-peach mixture onto a banh cuon sheet.
Roll up the banh cuon tightly and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
